motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def largestMerge(self, word1: str, word2: str) -> str:
        result = ''
        while word1 and word2:
            if word1 > word2:
                result += word1[0]
                word1 = word1[1:]
            else:
                result += word2[0]
                word2 = word2[1:]
        return result + word1 + word2
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n + m)
space complexity: O(n + m)
energy implications: LOW
